rulings.Case Title: COn WAY TRANSPORTATION VS. ROWE AUTO BODY SUPPLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Vacating The Dismissal Without Prejudice, To Correct Identity Of Deft., And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 12, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF CON WAY TRANSPORTATION MOTION For Order Vacating The Dismissal Without Prejudice, To Correct Identity Of Defendant, And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement IS DENIED. DISMISSAL OF THE CASE DEPRIVED THE COURT OF JURISDICTION, AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FALLS OUTSIDE THE TIME LIMIT OF SECTION 473(B) FOR RELIEF FROM THAT DISMISSAL. =(302/PJB/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET KAPLAN et al VS. BRETT R. PUGMIRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp 128.7; P/A; Declaration Ofjohn R. Browne Iii And Thom Chinn, And Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 12, 2007, LINE 6. PLAINTIFF MARGARET KAPLAN AND VIRGINIA CHAPMAN'S Motion For Sanctions Under C.C.P SECTION 128.7 IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SECTION 128.7(C)(1) REQUIREMENT OF DELAYED FILING. IN ANY EVENT, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THE CONDUCT DESERVING OF SANCTION. =(302/PJB/KD)
